mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SUP_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SUPPORT (SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN) VALUES (#{supNo}, #{supCn}, #{supAnsCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{regNo}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, SUP_ANS_REG, SUP_ANS_REG_HM, REG_NO, SUP_YN FROM SUPPORT WHERE sup_no = #{supNo}

SELECT SUP_NO, SUP_CN, SUP_ANS_CN, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUP_REG, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS SUP_REG, SUP_REG_HM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUP_ANS_REG, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS SUP_ANS_REG, SUP_ANS_REG, REG_NO, SUP_YN FROM SUPPORT ORDER BY SUP_NO DESC
